items.title: 5 ‘Necessities’ Frugal People Don’t Buy, According to Frugal Living Expert Austin Williams
items.description: In a YouTube video, frugal living expert Austin Williams discussed items typically considered "necessities" that frugal people don't buy.

items.title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Owns 6 Dow Jones Stocks. Here's My Top Buy for 2026.
items.description: This dividend-paying growth stock is a top buy for investors seeking a high-quality company at a favorable value.

items.title: Where Will Apple Stock Be in 5 Years?
items.description: This consumer tech leader has a great track record of delivering triple-digit returns over five-year periods.

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Bounce, Nvidia, Apple, Eli Lilly In Focus; Bitcoin The Weak Link?
items.description: The stock market rebounded Friday on Fed rate cut hopes but suffered damaging weekly losses. Nvidia, Apple and Eli Lilly are in focus.

items.title: Meta wants to get into the electricity trading business
items.description: In order to accelerate the construction of new power plants needed to provide energy for its data centers, Meta is looking to get into the business of trading electricity.
